links.title: Pope Leo XIV's Encyclical on AI and Human Dignity (Magnifica Humanitas)
links.notes: NYT coverage of Pope Leo XIV's first encyclical on safeguarding the human person in the age of artificial intelligence, including calls for AI regulation and worker protections.

links.title: AI Loss of Control Incidents and Extinction Risk
links.notes: AI Governance and Safety Canada's Executive Director Wyatt Tessari L'Allié tells Canadian MPs that AI loss of control incidents are already emerging, that experts warn AI poses a risk of human extinction, and that Canada should spearhead talks to prevent the threat.

links.title: CRAFT Resources
links.notes: A growing collection of AI education resources and lessons across AI and society, arts, science, language arts, math, and history-social science.

links.title: Critical Big Data and Algorithmic Literacy Network
links.authors: Critical Big Data and Algorithmic Literacy Network
links.notes: An international network and resource collection focused on critical thinking, ethical reflection, and education for datafication, big data, algorithms, and AI.

links.title: Teaching about Data: A Resource for Educators
links.notes: An educator resource for teaching critical data literacy, including how data and technology shape power, autonomy, public debate, and social decision-making.

links.title: Ethics & Algorithms Toolkit
links.authors: GovEx, City and County of San Francisco, Harvard DataSmart, and Data Community DC
links.notes: A practitioner-facing risk management toolkit for governments and other organizations to assess algorithmic risk, discuss impacts with stakeholders, and plan mitigation strategies.

links.title: Data Ethics Decision Aid (DEDA)
links.notes: An open-access toolkit that helps data analysts, project managers, and policymakers identify ethical and practical issues in data and AI projects, document deliberation, and support accountability.
